## Roles

- Owner (Jenya)
- Contributor
- Viewer (optional)

## Functional Requirements

- Invite-based access
- Easy revoke
- Clear role visibility

## Acceptance Criteria

- Owner controls all permissions
- Contributors can edit meals/events
- Changes are attributable
